hooks.prompt: A UI file was just edited. Quickly check: (1) Are keybindings consistent with the project convention (q=back to home, esc=exit sub-state, enter/i=inspect, space=pin, /=filter, r=refresh)? (2) Does the hint text at the bottom match actual keybindings? (3) Are error states handled with an escape route? (4) Hint bar is state-aware (switches on status). Only report ISSUES found, nothing else. If all good, say nothing.

A plugin file was just edited. Check: (1) Keybindings consistent (q=back, esc=exit sub-state, enter/i=inspect, space=pin, /=filter, r=refresh)? (2) Hint text matches actual keybindings? (3) Error states have escape routes? (4) No import of 'internal/' packages (must use pkg/sdk only)? (5) No direct import of other plugins (use EventBus)? (6) Plugin constructor is `func New(svc sdk.Service) sdk.Plugin`? Only report ISSUES. If all good, say nothing.

A CLI file was just edited. Check: (1) Data output goes to stdout, progress/status to stderr? (2) No stderr writes in JSON mode paths? (3) Exit codes correct (0=success, 1=error, 2=changes present for plan only)? (4) Error messages lowercase (Go convention)? (5) No 'Press X to Y' patterns? Only report ISSUES. If all good, say nothing.

An SDK file was just edited. Check: (1) If service.go was changed, do ExecService and MacroService still satisfy the interface? Run `mise run check:lint` to verify. (2) If a new event type was added, is there a matching handler interface? (3) If a new optional plugin interface was added, is it documented in CLAUDE.md? Only report ISSUES. If all good, say nothing.
